verses.text: Filistia-te a delhna panin Saul a ciah ciangin ama kiangah, “En in, Engedi gamlakah David om hi,” ci-in kigen hi
Tua ciangin Saul in Israel-te khempeuh sung pan a kitel mihing tul thum la-in Sathak Suangpi mai-ah David leh a mite a zong dingin a pai hi
Lam gei-a tuukhawk omna-ah a pai hi. Tua gei-ah leihawm khat om a, awng hawh dingin tua sungah Saul a pai hi. Tu-in David leh a mite tua leihawm tawngnung sungah na tu uh hi

Tua ciangin David' mite in ama kiangah, “ Topa in nang kiangah, ‘En in, na khutsungah na galpa kong pia ding a, hoih na sak bangin ama tungah na hih ding hi,’ hong cih pen tuni hita hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin David dingin Saul' puantualpi mong atkhiatsak sim hi
Tua khit ciangin amah in Saul' puanmong a atkhiat manin David a lungsim nuamthei nawnlo hi

Amah in a mite kiangah, “Amah pen Topa' sathau nilhpa hi, ci-in a thei gegupi-in ama tungah ka khut ka ngak ding, Topa' sathau nilhpa ahi ka topa tungah hih bang ka hih ding Topa in hong kham hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin David in hih thute tawh a mite zol a, amaute Saul hihsaklo hi. Tua ciangin Saul ding khia-in leihawm nusia a, a paina ding lampi-ah a paisuak hi
Tua khit ciangin David zong leihawm sung panin paikhia-in Saul nung sap a, “Ka to kumpipa!” a ci hi. Saul in a nung a et ciangin David in lei-ah a mai kunin zahtakna a bawl hi
Tua ciangin David in Saul kiangah, “Bang hangin, ‘En in, David in na siatna ding zong hi,’ a ci mite' thu um na hi hiam

En in, Topa in tuni-in leihawm sung, ka khutsungah nang hong piakna nangmahmah in tuni-in na thei khin hi. Mi pawlkhat in nang a that dingin kei hong sawl a, ahih hangin nang kong hih kei hi. Keimah in, ‘Ka topa tungah ka khut ka nga kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen Topa' sathau nilhpa ahi hi,’ ka ci hi

En in, ka pa aw, ka khutsunga na puantualpi mong en in. Kei tungah khialhna ahi a, kumpi dona ahi zongin a omlohna, na puantualpi mong atkhia napi-in nang kong thahlohna thu tawh thei-in na mu ding hi. Kei thah dingin nong zon' hangin nang tungah ka khial kei hi
Topa in kei leh nang kikalah thu hong khen ta hen. Topa in kei taangin nang tungah hong thuk ta hen. Ahih hangin keima khut tawh nang kong hih kei ding hi
Tang-ate' paunak in, ‘A gilote' sung panin gitlohna hong piang,’ a cih mah bang ahi hi. Ahih hangin keima khut tawh nang kong hih kei ding hi
Israel kumpipa kua do-a hong kuankhia ahi hiam? Kua delh na hi hiam? Uisi maw! Uili maw
Tua ahih ciangin Topa thukhen hong hi-in, kei leh nang kikalah thukhenna hong pia hen la, hih thu thei-in ka thu-ah hong pang hen la, na khutsung panin kei hong honkhia ta hen,” a ci hi
David in hih thute Saul kiangah a gen a man khit ciangin Saul in, “Ka tapa David, tu-a ka zak nang' aw ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Saul a kap hi
Amah in David kiangah, “Nang pen kei sangin na thuman zaw hi. Keimah in nang tungah a sia kong bawl laitakin nang in kei tungah a pha nong bawl hi
Topa in na khutsungah kei hong koih laitakin nang in kei nong thahlohna-ah kei nong limbawlna tu-in na hong laktel hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khatpeuh in a galpa mu leh amah in a suakta-in a galpa paikhiasak ding ahi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin tuni-in kei tungah nong bawlna hangin Topa in a hoih tawh nang thaman hong pia ta hen
Tu-in en in, kumpi na hih taktak ding ka thei hi. Israel kumpi gam nangma khutsungah a kip ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin keima nunga ka suanlekhakte beisak loin, ka pa' innkuan panin ka min na phiatlohna dingin Topa' min tawh kei tungah hong kiciam in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Saul' deih bangin David a kiciam hi. Tua ciangin Saul a inn-ah a ciah hi. Ahih hangin David leh a mite munmuan'huai-ah paito uh hi.
